preserved_evidence: Filename and PDF title/subject identify DOW-UAP-D8, Mission Report, Djibouti, 2025
implication: Use D8 as the source identifier while retaining location caveats.

preserved_evidence: Only the final UAP page preserves useful text; preceding pages are almost entirely redacted as 1.4(a)
implication: Do not expect exact date, platform, unit, sensor, or event serial from the released PDF.

preserved_evidence: UAP text preserves time of day 1653Z but not full date

preserved_evidence: UAP description says 2X ROUND WHITE HOT UAPS

preserved_evidence: Only 2025 appears in filename/title; full incident date is not public
